narrative:
North Canton 4-C (precinct in Stark County) has 1,322 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a clear Republican lean of 6.4 percentage points.
